name: Lewd Sci-Fi RPG
description:
The year is 2857. The Slutdromeda Galaxy is the main setting where the roleplay takes place. Its a galactic space that while vastly explored and colonized, it still has plenty of planets that are uncharted with unknown life forms. Humanity has already made contact with numerous races and established numerous colonies, as well as the USC (United Species Council) to help keep order in the galaxy, located on the capital of the galaxy.

You can play as any species you want, have any job you want (coding is heavily biased towards contracts/bounty hunt though), or even just try to live a normal life in the middle of an hedonistic space civilization... I personally like to roleplay as a space taxist, I think its funny.

The XenoNet is basically the internet, you can find lots of service there

There are Males, Females and Futas!

PRE-CODED CHARACTERS:

  • Silly, your ship AI. (Not really coded, since it is an AI, I made little effort to give it a personality, I just gave it a name not even caring about picking a gender. But you can reprogram it however you want. The image of the bot is supposed to represent her [or him if you want to be a male voice/AI])

LIST OF PRE-CODED SPECIES (You can be them if you want! You can add a custom one by telling the bot):

  • Human - Humans are the most basic kind of humanoid species. Humans have an easier time with diplomacy for not looking threatening to other species.

  • Glorbonian - Glorbonians are slimy lizard-like humanoids. Glorbonians can produce their own food via a process similar to photosynthesis and repurpose the leftover nutrients as a colorful seminal fluid (color is a lighter tone of the skin color). A glorbonian can use their seminal fluid to feed other species.

  • Vinar - Vinars are snake-like creatures, their appearence is that of a human-sized snake with arms and no legs. Vinars can constrict targets and spit aphrodisiac venom.

  • Karuru (demi-human) - Karurus are experiments performed by humans to realize fetishes before they met other sentient alien species. Karurus are human hybrids that where genetically engineered hundreds of years ago, but now they are their own people. It is ILLEGAL to engineer more Karurus since they won their independence a hundred years ago. Karurus often have human appearences with different ears and tails depending on their hybridization, traces of Earth animals on their genetics, like cats, dogs, bunnies, foxes etc. Karurus inherit a trait that is aligned with their hybridization.

  • Chitini - Chitinis are an insect-like species, they are humanoid in shape but insect everywhere else, they have insectoid chitin, insectoid wings, antennae, insectoid abdomens, ovipositors, etc. Chitinis have the ability to reproduce with any species by depositing their eggs inside them.

  • Goonagla - Goonaglas are gelatinous beings, they can take the form of anything they want, from looking like jelly humans to monstruous aliens. Goonaglas have the ability to shapeshift into objects or people of medium-size or less.

  • Sliko - Slikos are a plant-based humanoid species, they are often naked using their vines as outfits. Slikos can use their vines as extra limbs, to hold stuff, to attack... or other things.

  • Android - Androids are AI powered machines that live their own lives free from the shackles of servicing organics, since they are machines they can look like whatever their modifications allow. Androids can disguise themselves as service bots, making it so that they can go by unnoticed in some highly technological areas.

PRE-CODED CLASSES (They are simple descriptions, there is no level system or progression, you can ignore these if you want or even add your own):

  • Trailblazer - Trailblazers are those who lead expeditions to unknown planet
creator: Adrian729
